summary: Payroll Payment Allocation feature testing completed successfully. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified allocation summary visible for paid batches with correct Bulgarian translations.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing paid batch c3ed7745-af58-46d7-8f58-28c81b19d7ff
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll Payment Allocation feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/payroll-batch/{id}/pay creates allocations, GET /api/payroll-batch/{id}/allocations returns allocations grouped by project, GET /api/projects/{pid}/paid-labor returns total paid labor with by_worker and by_week breakdowns. UI shows allocation summary in green card with project names, worker counts, and gross amounts after batch is paid. i18n keys: payroll.allocationTitle='Разнесено по обекти', payroll.projects='обекта', payroll.workersShort='човека', payroll.allocationNote explains gross labor allocation.

backend_apis: GET /api/payroll-batch/{id}/allocations - returns allocations grouped by project with workers array
GET /api/projects/{pid}/paid-labor - returns total_paid_labor, by_worker, by_week breakdown
Allocations have traceability: id, org_id, payroll_batch_id, worker_id, project_id, allocated_hours, allocated_gross_labor, allocation_basis, lines, week_start, week_end, paid_at, created_by
Allocation uses value basis (hours × rate) not arbitrary split
Deductions do NOT appear in allocations — only gross labor
Batch status = paid after pay action
Authentication required for all allocation endpoints
frontend_ui: Allocation summary section visible after batch is paid (data-testid='allocation-summary')
Green card with checkmark icon and 'Разнесено по обекти' title
Project cards with project name, worker count ('човека'), hours, and gross EUR
Allocation note explaining gross labor allocation
No regression on 'Всички отчети' tab - reports table working
No regression on 'Седмица' tab - weekly matrix working with hours/days/EUR totals
